evals.description: User asks to speed read a markdown file at 300 WPM
evals.prompt: Speed read my file notes.md at 300 WPM
evals.expected_behavior: Invoke rsvp-reading skill, parse notes.md, generate token stream at 300 WPM

evals.description: User asks to RSVP a PDF document
evals.expected_behavior: Invoke rsvp-reading skill, parse research.pdf, prompt for WPM if not given

evals.description: User asks about reading comprehension strategies in general
evals.prompt: What are some good speed reading tips?
evals.expected_behavior: Answer conversationally, do not invoke the rsvp-reading skill

evals.description: User asks to summarize a document, not speed read it
evals.prompt: Can you summarize this report.pdf for me?
evals.expected_behavior: Invoke a summarization skill, not rsvp-reading
